mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO scheme_item ( scheme_id, rspu_id, rsku_id, factory_code, factory_price, lead_time_days, moq, quantity, sort_order, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.schemeId}, #{item.rspuId}, #{item.rskuId}, #{item.factoryCode}, #{item.factoryPrice}, #{item.leadTimeDays}, #{item.moq}, #{item.quantity}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.createdAt} )
